response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive fullstack development experience with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js expertise, along with pragmatic architecture skills. His background includes scalable systems, API integrations, and relational databases, aligning well with the role. While his recent focus leans toward AI-agent infrastructure, his prior work in renewable energy-adjacent projects (e.g., Green Map, Geo-Data platforms) and energy-efficient workflows suggests adaptability to the renewable energy domain.
strengths: Deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, covering database to UI
Proven experience with scalable systems, API integrations, and cloud services (AWS, Kubernetes)
Strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD) and collaborative development practices
concerns: Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (uses MongoDB/Kubernetes more frequently)
Recent focus on AI-agent infrastructure may divert attention from core stack requirements
Higher seniority level may lead to overqualification or mismatched expectations
